fields.description: A person who knowingly utters, as if it were a subsisting and effectual document, any document that has been ordered revoked, cancelled or suspended by lawful authority, or whose operation has ceased by affluxion of time, death, or any other event, commits an offence. The offender is liable to the same punishment as if they had forged the document.
fields.elements: ["[\"Actor: a person\", \"Act: utters (presents, uses, or offers) a document for a subsisting and effectual document\", \"Object: a document that is not subsisting/effectual because it has been revoked, cancelled, suspended, or its operation has ceased\", \"Result: commission of an offence punishable as forgery\"]"]
fields.penalty: Liable to the same punishment as for forging the document.

fields.title: Uttering counterfeit coin
fields.description: A person who utters any counterfeit coin, knowing it to be counterfeit, commits an offence under this section.
fields.elements: ["[\"Person utters (passes, offers, or circulates) a coin\", \"The coin is counterfeit\", \"The person knows the coin is counterfeit\"]"]

fields.title: Uttering false documents
fields.description: A person who knowingly and fraudulently utters a false document commits an offence. The offender is liable to the punishment provided for the offence of forgery in relation to that document.
fields.elements: ["[\"A person utters (publishes, presents, or uses) a document\", \"The document is false\", \"The utterance is done knowingly and fraudulently\"]"]
fields.penalty: Shall be liable to the punishment provided for in respect of the offence of forgery in relation to that document.

fields.title: Uttering medal or metal as coin
fields.description: A person who, with intent to defraud, utters as and for coin any medal or piece of metal (whether a coin or not) that is of less value than the coin it is represented as commits an offence. The offence is punishable by imprisonment for one year.
fields.elements: ["[\"A person utters (passes or offers) as and for coin any medal or piece of metal\", \"The metal may be a coin or not\", \"The metal is of less value than the coin as and for which it is uttered\", \"The act is done with intent to defraud\"]"]

fields.title: Uttering word with intent to wound religious feelings
fields.description: A person who, with the deliberate intention of wounding the religious feelings of any person, utters any word, makes any sound in the hearing of that person, makes any gesture in the sight of that person, or places any object in the sight of that person, commits an offence. On conviction the person is liable to a fine of not less than three million shillings or to imprisonment for a term of not less than one year.
fields.elements: ["[\"an actor who is a person\", \"the actor has the deliberate intention of wounding the religious feelings of any person\", \"the actor utters any word in the hearing of that person, or makes any sound in the hearing of that person, or makes any gesture in the sight of that person, or places any object in the sight of that person\"]"]
fields.penalty: A fine of not less than three million shillings or imprisonment for a term of not less than one year.

fields.title: Vagrancy — able-bodied person idle without visible means of subsistence
fields.description: An able-bodied person who is not engaged in any productive work and has no visible means of subsistence shall be deemed an idle and disorderly person and liable to the prescribed penalty.
fields.elements: ["[\"The person is able-bodied\", \"The person is not engaged in any productive work\", \"The person has no visible means of subsistence\"]"]
fields.penalty: A fine not exceeding one hundred thousand shillings or to imprisonment for a period not exceeding three months or to both.

fields.title: Watching or besetting
fields.description: A person who watches or besets any premises or other place, or approaches such premises or place, with a view to preventing any other person from doing any act which that person may lawfully do, or with a view to compelling any other person to do any act which that person may lawfully abstain from doing, commits an offence and is liable to imprisonment for six months.
fields.elements: ["[\"A person watches or besets any premises or other place, or approaches any such premises or place\", \"The person acts with a view to preventing any other person from doing any act which that other person may lawfully do\", \"Or the person acts with a view to compelling any other person to do any act which that other person may lawfully abstain from doing\"]"]

fields.title: Wearing prescribed uniform or attire without Presidential permission
fields.description: A person who is not serving in the Defence Forces, a police force or any law enforcement organ and who, without the permission of the President, wears the uniform of those forces or any attire having the appearance or bearing any regimental or other distinctive marks of such uniform commits an offence.
fields.elements: ["[\"A person\", \"Not being a person serving in the Defence Forces of the United Republic or in any police force or any law enforcement organ established by law\", \"Wears without the permission of the President\", \"The uniform of any of those forces or any attire having the appearance or bearing any regimental or other distinctive marks of such uniform or attire\"]"]
fields.penalty: Imprisonment for one month or a fine of fifty thousand shillings.

fields.title: Wilful neglect by master to provide food, clothing or lodging for apprentice or servant
fields.description: A person who, being legally liable as a master or mistress to provide for any apprentice or servant necessary food, clothing, or lodging, wilfully and without lawful excuse refuses or neglects to provide them commits an offence.
fields.elements: ["[\"Person is legally liable as a master or mistress to provide for an apprentice or servant\", \"Apprentice or servant is in need of necessary food, clothing, or lodging\", \"Person wilfully refuses or neglects to provide the necessary food, clothing, or lodging\", \"Refusal or neglect is without lawful excuse\"]"]

fields.title: Wilful neglect to bury a dead body when under a duty to do so
fields.description: A person who, being under a duty to cause the dead body of any person to be buried, wilfully and without lawful authority neglects to perform that duty commits an offence.
fields.elements: ["[\"Actor: a person who is under a duty to cause burial\", \"Conduct: wilful neglect to perform the duty\", \"Object: the dead body of any person\", \"Absence of lawful authority for the neglect\"]"]

fields.title: Woman living on the earnings of prostitution
fields.description: A woman who knowingly lives wholly or in part on the earnings of prostitution commits an offence.
fields.elements: ["[\"Offender is a woman\", \"Lives wholly or in part on the earnings of prostitution\", \"Conduct is knowing\"]"]

fields.title: Wounding and similar acts
fields.description: A person who unlawfully wounds another, or who unlawfully and with intent to injure or annoy causes any poison or other noxious thing to be administered to or taken by any person, commits an offence.
fields.elements: ["[\"Accused is a person\", \"Accused unlawfully wounds another person\", \"OR accused unlawfully causes any poison or other noxious thing to be administered to a person\", \"OR accused unlawfully causes any poison or other noxious thing to be taken by a person\", \"For the poisoning alternative, the act is done with intent to injure or annoy any person\"]"]

fields.title: Written threats to murder
fields.description: A person who, knowing the contents of a writing, directly or indirectly causes any person to receive a writing that threatens to kill any person commits an offence. The offence is punishable by imprisonment for seven years.
fields.elements: ["[\"A person (the accused) causes any person to receive a writing\", \"The writing contains a threat to kill any person\", \"The accused knows the contents of the writing\"]"]

fields.title: Wrongful confinement
fields.description: A person who wrongfully confines another person commits an offence. The offender is liable to a fine of three hundred thousand shillings or to imprisonment for one year.
fields.elements: ["[\"Actor is a person\", \"There is another person who is confined (victim)\", \"Confinement/deprivation of the victim's liberty\", \"Confinement is wrongful/unlawful\"]"]
fields.penalty: Fine of three hundred thousand shillings or imprisonment for one year.

fields.title: Wrongful issue of notes
fields.description: A person who issues or is a party to issuing any note purporting to be a currency note of Tanzania or any bank note purporting to be currency in Tanzania, otherwise than in accordance with the provisions of the Bank of Tanzania Act, commits an offence. On conviction the offender is liable to imprisonment for a term not exceeding five years.
fields.elements: ["[\"A person issues or is a party to issuing\", \"A note purports to be a currency note of Tanzania OR a bank note purports to be currency in Tanzania\", \"The issue is otherwise than in accordance with the provisions of the Bank of Tanzania Act\"]"]
fields.penalty: Imprisonment for a term not exceeding five years.

fields.title: Wrongfully concealing kidnapped or abducted person
fields.description: A person who, knowing that another person has been kidnapped or abducted, wrongfully conceals or confines that person commits an offence. The offender shall be punished in the same manner as if he had kidnapped or abducted that person with the same intention, knowledge, or for the same purpose as that with or for which he conceals or detains the person in confinement.
fields.elements: ["[\"Wrongfully conceals or confines a person\", \"The person concealed or confined has been kidnapped or abducted\", \"The offender knows that the person has been kidnapped or abducted\"]"]
fields.penalty: Shall be punished in the same manner as if he had kidnapped or abducted that person with the same intention or knowledge, or for the same purpose, as that with or for which he conceals or detains the person in confinement.
